name: Sweet Red Pepper Spread
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces roasted red sweet peppers, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the tortilla chips, pita chips (preheat oven to 350°F and bake for about 15 minutes), or French bread.
2. Roast your own peppers: Bake 2 medium peppers at 425°F for 20 minutes, turning occasionally. Grill whole peppers over fire for about 20 minutes. Dry-fry whole peppers, turning often, for 30-40 minutes. Peel and remove stems and seeds. Alternatively, purchase a 7-ounce jar.
3. Chop the roasted peppers in a blender.
4. Add the tomato paste, sugar, fresh thyme, salt, garlic to taste, and red pepper flakes to the blender.
5. Blend until nearly smooth.
6. Makes 3/4 cup, serving six portions with approximately 130 calories each (Refrigerate up to 1 week).
7. For variations: Use a batch with 1/8 teaspoon garlic powder or another with 1 teaspoon minced or pureed garlic.
